Fixing [[:Category:Harv and Sfn no-target errors|harv/sfn reference errors]] caused by use of {{excerpt}}. You have to copy over any sources called by refs in the excerpted text. And if the source article is edited, you may have to edit here too. Please install [[User:Trappist the monk/HarvErrors.js]] and watchlist [[:Category:Harv and Sfn no-target errors]] to help you spot such errors when reading and editing.
/* Legality of the blockade */ "Said" (always the preferred word). "Noted" dresses an opinion as an objective reality. Also reworded a sentence that was unclear.
